invite_page.title: Bot Not in {{name}}
invite_page.desc: Invite {{botName}} to this server to start managing settings.

servers.title: Dashboard
servers.subtitle: Select the server you want to manage. ({{count}} server(s))
servers.no_servers: You have no servers with Manage Guild permission.

home.welcome_sub: Welcome to the dashboard — manage your server from here.
home.nickname_sub: Change the bot's display name in this server
home.nickname_placeholder: Leave blank to reset to original name
home.perm_hint: Open Discord server settings → Roles → select the bot role → enable the permissions above.
home.feat_welcome_desc: Automatic welcome card & message when a member joins.
home.feat_goodbye_desc: Automatic goodbye card & message when a member leaves.
home.feat_boost_desc: Automatic notification when a member boosts the server.
home.feat_unboost_desc: Automatic notification when a member removes their server boost.
home.feat_autorole_join_desc: Automatically assign a role when a member or bot joins.
home.feat_autorole_booster_desc: Automatically give & remove role when member boosts/unboosts.
home.feat_autorole_button_desc: Interactive button panel for members to choose their own roles.
home.feat_autorole_reaction_desc: Emoji reaction panel for members to choose roles by clicking emoji.
home.feat_automod_desc: Anti-link, anti-invite, spam detection, mass mention, and auto antiraid.
home.feat_warnings_desc: Graduated warning system with automatic actions when thresholds are reached.
home.feat_modlog_desc: Log all moderation actions — ban, kick, timeout, and warn — to a log channel.
home.feat_ticket_desc: Private ticket system for members to request help from staff.
home.feat_giveaway_desc: Create and manage automatic giveaways with random winners.
home.feat_message_builder_desc: Create and send embed message templates to any channel.
home.feat_serverstats_desc: Automatically display server statistics via voice channels.
home.feat_invites_desc: View all server invite links and their usage statistics.
home.feat_youtube_desc: Automatic notification when a YouTube channel uploads a new video.
home.feat_tiktok_desc: Automatic notification when a TikTok account uploads a new video.
home.feat_twitch_desc: Automatic notification when a Twitch streamer starts live streaming.
home.feat_kick_desc: Automatic notification when a Kick.com streamer starts live streaming.

common.roles_hint: Only roles that can be assigned by the bot are shown.
common.perm_missing: {{count}} permission(s) not yet granted to the bot:
common.perm_hint: Open Discord server settings → Roles → select the bot role → enable the permissions above.

welcome.page_desc: Notification sent when a new member joins the server.
welcome.bg_image_hint: JPEG/PNG image URL · Will be auto-resized to fit the card
welcome.step1_desc: Choose the text channel where the welcome message will be sent when a new member joins.
welcome.step2_desc: Set the embed, colors, text template, and optionally enable the welcome card with a custom background.
welcome.step3_desc: Toggle the feature on and click Save to activate. New members will trigger the notification immediately.
welcome.tip: Use the {mention}, {username}, and {count} placeholders in your message to personalize each welcome.

goodbye.page_desc: Notification sent when a member leaves the server.
goodbye.step1_desc: Choose the text channel where the goodbye message will be sent when a member leaves.
goodbye.step2_desc: Set the embed, colors, and text template. You can also enable a goodbye card with a custom background.
goodbye.step3_desc: Toggle the feature on and click Save to activate. Members leaving the server will trigger the notification.
goodbye.tip: Use the {username}, {server}, and {count} placeholders to personalize each goodbye message.

booster.page_desc: Automatic notification when a member boosts the server.
booster.unboost_desc: Automatic notification when a member removes their server boost.
booster.tab_boost_desc: Automatic notification when a member boosts the server.
booster.tab_unboost_desc: Automatic notification when a member removes their server boost.
booster.err_no_channel: Please select a destination channel first.
booster.step1_desc: Choose the channel where boost and unboost notifications will be sent.
booster.step2_desc: Set the embed, text template, and optionally enable the boost card with a custom background.
booster.step3_desc: Toggle the notification on and click Save to activate. Check the Unboost tab to also configure unboost notifications.
booster.tip: Use the {mention}, {boosts}, and {level} placeholders to personalize boost messages.
booster.unboost_step1_desc: Choose the channel where the unboost notification will be sent.
booster.unboost_step2_desc: Set the embed, text template, and optionally enable the unboost card with a custom background.
booster.unboost_step3_desc: Toggle Enable Unboost Notification on and click Save to activate.
booster.unboost_tip: The unboost notification fires when a member removes their server boost. Use the same placeholders as the boost tab.

autorole.join_desc: Role automatically assigned when a member or bot joins the server.
autorole.join_desc_full: Role automatically assigned when a member or bot joins the server.
autorole.booster_desc: Automatically give & remove role when member boosts/unboosts.
autorole.button_desc: Interactive button panel for members to choose their own roles.
autorole.reaction_desc: Emoji reaction panel for members to choose roles by clicking emoji.
autorole.booster_tab_desc: Role automatically assigned when a member boosts the server, and removed when they unboost.
autorole.autoremove_toggle: Automatically remove role when member stops boosting
autorole.autoremove_hint: If enabled, the booster role will be immediately removed when a member removes their boost.
autorole.btn_no_panels: No panels yet. Click ＋ New Panel to create an autorole button panel.
autorole.react_no_panels: No panels yet. Click ＋ New Panel to create an autorole reaction panel.
autorole.click_panel_preview: Click a panel to see preview
autorole.error_join_member_role: Please select a role for member autorole.
autorole.error_join_bot_role: Please select a role for bot autorole.
autorole.error_booster_role: Please select a role for booster autorole.
autorole.discord_cmd_hint: Panels can also be created in Discord with the command
autorole.footer_ph: Text at the bottom of the embed...
autorole.btn_save_hint: 💡 Button changes below will be saved together with the embed when you click Save Changes in the floating bar.
autorole.react_save_hint: 💡 Reaction changes below will be saved together with the embed when you click Save Changes in the floating bar.
autorole.no_inline_buttons_hint: No buttons yet. Click ＋ Add Button to add one, or skip and add later.
autorole.no_inline_react_hint: No reactions yet. Click ＋ Add Reaction to add one.
autorole.react_tips_body: Use Unicode emoji like 👍 🎮 ⭐ 🎭 or custom server emoji with format <:name:id>. Max 20 reactions per panel.
autorole.send_btn_once_hint: ⚠️ Panel can only be sent once. After sending, use Edit Panel to update the embed or buttons.
autorole.send_react_once_hint: ⚠️ Panel can only be sent once. After sending, use Edit Panel to update the embed or reactions.
autorole.join_step1_desc: Choose the role for Members and/or Bots in the selectors below.
autorole.join_step2_desc: Toggle Enable for Members and/or Enable for Bots to activate autorole.
autorole.join_step3_desc: Click Save. Every new member or bot that joins will automatically receive the configured role.
autorole.join_tip: Member and bot autoroles are independent — you can enable or disable each one separately.
autorole.ar_boost_step1_desc: Select the role automatically given to a member when they boost the server.
autorole.ar_boost_step2_desc: Toggle Autoremove on Unboost to automatically remove the booster role when they stop boosting.
autorole.ar_boost_step3_desc: Toggle Enable Autorole Booster on and click Save to activate.
autorole.ar_boost_tip: If autoremove is on, the role is removed immediately when a member removes their server boost.
autorole.button_step1_desc: Click ＋ New Panel, fill in the embed, and add role buttons.
autorole.button_step2_desc: Select a channel and click Send to post the interactive button panel.
autorole.button_step3_desc: Members click the buttons to get or remove roles. Use Multi mode to stack roles, or Single for one active role at a time.
autorole.button_tip: After sending, use Edit Panel to update the embed or buttons — the panel cannot be sent again.
autorole.react_step1_desc: Click ＋ New Panel, fill in the embed, and add emoji-role pairs.
autorole.react_step2_desc: Select a channel and click Send to post the reaction panel.
autorole.react_step3_desc: Members click the emoji reactions to get or remove the corresponding role. Reacting again removes the role.
autorole.react_tip: Use Unicode emoji (👍 ⭐ 🎮) or custom server emoji with format <:name:id>. Max 20 reactions per panel.

automod.page_desc: Automatic moderation system to protect the server from spam, harmful links, profanity, and other violations.
automod.general_config_desc: Configure bot actions when a violation is detected, mute role, and audit log channel.
automod.action_choose_hint: Choose what the bot does when a violation is detected.
automod.timeout_uses_discord: Uses Discord's built-in timeout. Bot requires the Moderate Members permission.
automod.audit_log_hint: All automod activity will be logged here.
automod.link_desc: Automatically block messages containing URLs, Discord invites, or file attachments. Changes are saved immediately.
automod.antilink_label: Anti-Link — Block all URLs (http, https, www)
automod.antiattach_label: Anti-Attachment — Block messages containing files or images
automod.spam_desc: Take action against members who send messages too quickly in a short time.
automod.mention_desc: Take action against members who mention many people or roles in a single message.
automod.raid_desc: Detect mass joins in a short time. Bot will automatically raise the server verification level.
automod.join_limit_hint: Joins considered a raid within 1 interval (2–50)
automod.words_desc: Messages containing the following words will be automatically deleted (case-insensitive).
automod.whitelist_desc: The following channels and roles will be excluded from all Automod checks.
automod.step1_desc: Choose what the bot does when a violation is detected — delete, warn, mute, kick, or ban.
automod.step2_desc: Toggle anti-link, anti-invite, anti-spam, anti-mass-mention, and anti-raid protections on or off.
automod.step3_desc: Add channels or roles to exclude from automod checks. Useful for staff channels or admin roles.
automod.tip: Use the Banned Words section to add custom words. Messages containing those words will be automatically deleted.

modlog.page_desc: Log all moderation actions to a designated channel.
modlog.config_desc: Select the text channel where all moderation logs will be sent. Leave blank to disable mod log.
modlog.events_desc: Select which moderation action types to log. Changes are saved immediately when a toggle is changed.
modlog.evt_ban: Ban Member — Log when a member is banned from the server
modlog.evt_unban: Unban Member — Log when a member's ban is removed
modlog.evt_kick: Kick Member — Log when a member is kicked from the server
modlog.evt_timeout: Timeout Member — Log when a member is timed out or timeout is removed
modlog.evt_warn: Warning — Log when a moderator adds a warning via /warn add
modlog.info_body: The bot listens to Discord's Audit Log. Every moderation action performed by anyone on the server will be automatically logged to the selected channel. Use /modlog test to send a test embed to the log channel.
modlog.step1_desc: Select the text channel where all moderation action logs will be sent.
modlog.step2_desc: Toggle which moderation actions to log — ban, unban, kick, timeout, and warn.
modlog.step3_desc: The bot automatically logs all selected events. Use /modlog test in Discord to verify the channel is working.
modlog.tip: Mod Log reads Discord's Audit Log — any moderation action by any moderator is automatically captured and logged.

warnings.page_desc: Graduated warning system with automatic actions when thresholds are reached.
warnings.threshold_config_desc: Bot will automatically punish members when their warn count reaches a certain number. Use /warn add to give warnings manually.
warnings.search_desc: Enter a Discord User ID to view all warnings for that member. Enable Developer Mode in Discord → right-click user → Copy User ID.
warnings.history_desc: Warning log given by moderators using /warn add.
warnings.confirm_delete_all: Delete all warnings for this user?
warnings.err_invalid_id: Please enter a valid User ID (17–19 digits).
warnings.step1_desc: Configure automatic actions (timeout, kick, ban) that trigger when a member reaches a specific warning count.
warnings.step2_desc: Use /warn add @user reason in Discord to issue warnings manually to rule-breaking members.
warnings.step3_desc: When a member's warning count reaches a threshold, the bot automatically applies the configured action.
warnings.tip: Search member warnings by Discord User ID using the search tool below. You can also delete all warnings for a member.

ticket.page_desc: Private ticket system for members to request help from staff.
ticket.enable_desc: Members can create tickets via the panel button.
ticket.category_hint: Ticket channels will be created inside this category.
ticket.log_hint: Transcript is sent to this channel when a ticket is closed.
ticket.staff_empty: No staff roles yet. Add one below.
ticket.staff_hint: Role that can view and manage all tickets. The server owner can always view tickets.
ticket.err_no_channel: Please select a destination channel first.
ticket.embed_desc_default: Click the button below to create a ticket.
ticket.step1_desc: Set the ticket category, transcript log channel, and staff roles who can view and manage tickets.
ticket.step2_desc: Set the embed title, description, button label, and choose the channel where the ticket panel will be sent.
ticket.step3_desc: Click Send Panel to post the panel in a channel. Members click the button to open a private support ticket.
ticket.tip: Only staff roles (and the server owner) can view and manage tickets. You can view all active tickets in the Active Tickets section below.

giveaway.page_desc: Create and manage automatic giveaways with random winners.
giveaway.step1_desc: Enter the prize, destination channel, duration, and number of winners in the form below.
giveaway.step2_desc: The bot automatically sends a giveaway embed to the selected channel and adds a 🎉 reaction.
giveaway.step3_desc: Members click 🎉 to join. When time runs out, the bot automatically picks a random winner and announces the result.
giveaway.tip: You can end the giveaway early, reroll winners, or cancel from the list below. Ended giveaways are saved automatically (max. 30 history). Can also be created via the /giveaway start slash command in Discord.
giveaway.no_giveaways: No giveaways yet. Create the first one using the form above!
giveaway.confirm_end: End this giveaway now and pick winners?
giveaway.confirm_reroll: Pick new winners for this giveaway?
giveaway.confirm_delete: Delete this giveaway from history? This action cannot be undone.
giveaway.confirm_cancel: Cancel this giveaway? No winners will be selected.
giveaway.err_winners: Number of winners must be at least 1.

message_builder.page_desc: Create and send embed message templates to any channel.
message_builder.category_regular: Regular — can be sent multiple times
message_builder.category_unique: Unique — send once, can be edited
message_builder.confirm_delete: Delete template "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
message_builder.err_name_invalid: Invalid name. Use letters, numbers, - and _.
message_builder.step1_desc: Click New Template, give it a name, and choose between Regular (multi-send) or Unique (send once, edit in place).
message_builder.step2_desc: Add a title, description, embed color, footer, image, or write plain text. Preview updates in real time.
message_builder.step3_desc: Click Send on any template to post it to a channel. Unique templates can be edited after sending.
message_builder.tip: Use Unique templates for permanent announcements — the embed can be updated later without sending a new message.

serverstats.page_desc: Automatically display server statistics via voice channels.
serverstats.status_desc: Enable to automatically update voice channels when a member joins or leaves.
serverstats.label_format_desc: Use {count} as the number placeholder. Max 90 characters per label.
serverstats.reset_desc: Deletes all configuration and removes the category & stats channels created by the bot.
serverstats.setup_desc: Server Stats is not set up. Click the button below to create the category and stats channels.
serverstats.confirm_reset_desc: This action will permanently delete all stats channels created by the bot.
serverstats.setup_will_create:
Will be created:
📁 1 Category  ·  👥 Total Members Channel  ·  👤 Users Channel  ·  🤖 Bots Channel
serverstats.step1_desc: Click Create Stats Channels to automatically create a category with three stat channels in your server.
serverstats.step2_desc: Set the channel name format using {count} as the number placeholder (e.g., "Members: {count}").
serverstats.step3_desc: Stats update automatically whenever a member joins or leaves the server. No further action needed.
serverstats.tip: Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission. Use Reset Server Stats to remove all stat channels if needed.

invites.page_desc: View all server invite links and their usage statistics.
invites.no_invites: No active invite links on this server.
invites.no_results: No invites match the current filter.

youtube.page_desc: Automatic notification when a YouTube channel uploads a new video.
youtube.add_desc: Enter Channel ID, handle, or YouTube URL. Slots remaining: {{remaining}} of {{max}}.
youtube.max_reached: Maximum limit of {{max}} YouTube channels per server has been reached.
youtube.no_channels: No YouTube channels being monitored yet.
youtube.confirm_delete:
Remove channel "{{name}}" from monitoring?
All notification settings for it will also be deleted.
youtube.confirm_reset:
Reset last video position?

The next poll will treat the current latest video as "already sent" and only notify for newer videos.
youtube.err_enter_input: Enter a YouTube Channel ID or handle.
youtube.default_video_desc:
Hey, {ytChName} just uploaded a new video on YouTube!
Don't miss it, watch now! 🎉
youtube.default_short_desc:
{ytChName} just posted a new Short!
Check out their quick video, don't miss out! ⚡
youtube.default_live_desc:
Hey, {ytChName} is LIVE on YouTube right now!
Come join and watch the stream~ 🎉

tiktok.page_desc: Automatic notification when a TikTok account uploads a new video.
tiktok.add_desc: Enter username or TikTok URL. Slots remaining: {{remaining}} of {{max}}.
tiktok.searching_wait: This process may take a moment, please wait
tiktok.max_reached: Maximum limit of {{max}} TikTok accounts per server has been reached.
tiktok.no_accounts: No TikTok accounts being monitored yet.
tiktok.err_no_video_channel: Video notification is enabled but no Discord channel has been selected.
tiktok.err_no_live_channel: Live notification is enabled but no Discord channel has been selected.

twitch.page_desc: Automatic notification when a Twitch streamer starts live streaming.
twitch.add_desc: Enter username or Twitch URL. Slots remaining: {{remaining}} of {{max}}.
twitch.max_reached: Maximum limit of {{max}} Twitch streamers per server has been reached.
twitch.no_streamers: No Twitch streamers being monitored yet.
twitch.err_no_channel: Notification is enabled but no Discord channel has been selected.

kick.page_desc: Automatic notification when a Kick.com streamer starts live streaming.
kick.add_desc: Enter username or Kick URL. Slots remaining: {{remaining}} of {{max}}.
kick.max_reached: Maximum limit of {{max}} Kick streamers per server has been reached.
kick.no_streamers: No Kick streamers being monitored yet.
kick.err_no_channel: Notification is enabled but no Discord channel has been selected.
kick.api_note: Register your app at kick.com/settings/developer to get Client ID and Secret.

landing.subtitle: A powerful, reliable, and easy-to-use Discord bot — built to help communities grow faster. From moderation and automation to advanced server utilities.
landing.why1_desc: Complete moderation system — ban, kick, mute, tiered warnings — with automod that automatically detects spam, harmful links, mass mentions, and raids. All actions are neatly logged in the mod log.
landing.mock1_banned_desc: BadUser#0001 has been banned from the server.
landing.mock1_automod_desc: Message from Spammer#9999 auto-deleted. Member received a warning.
landing.why2_desc: Create exciting giveaways in seconds — set duration, number of winners, and entry requirements. The bot automatically picks random winners and supports rerolls if needed.
landing.why3_desc: Welcome new members with a fully customizable message — embed, welcome card, and custom background. Auto role is assigned immediately on join.
landing.mock3_welcome_body:
You are member #247 in this server.
Please read #rules and enjoy your stay!
landing.feat_subheading: 10 powerful features available directly from the dashboard and slash commands.
landing.feat_welcome_desc: Automatic welcome and goodbye messages with embed, welcome card, and full customization.
landing.feat_boost_desc: Automatic notifications when a member boosts or unboosts the server, including a boost card.
landing.feat_autorole_desc: Automatically assign roles to new members, bots, or boosters — including a role-picker button panel.
landing.feat_serverstats_desc: Display the total member count in real-time via auto-updating voice channels.
landing.feat_msgbuilder_desc: Create and send embed templates to any channel directly from the web dashboard.
landing.feat_invites_desc: Monitor all server invite links along with usage statistics, sorted by most used.
landing.feat_ticket_desc: Private ticket system so members can request staff help, with a customizable panel.
landing.feat_giveaway_desc: Create and manage automatic giveaways with random winners — start, end, and reroll via slash command.
landing.feat_moderation_desc: Manage server security — ban, kick, mute, tiered warnings, automod, and a complete mod log.
landing.feat_socialmedia_desc: Automatic notifications from YouTube, TikTok, Twitch, and Kick when new videos or streams go live.
landing.cta_desc: Login with your Discord account and start managing your server directly from the browser.

footer.bot_desc: is a Discord Server assistant designed to keep your community fun, organized, and comfortable.

report_bug.page_desc: Found a bug? Let us know and we'll fix it as soon as possible.
report_bug.header_desc: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Fill out the form below and our team will follow up on your report shortly.
report_bug.discord_user_hint: — we'll contact you if we need clarification
report_bug.discord_autofill: ✓ Discord info auto-filled from your logged-in account.
report_bug.message_ph: Describe the bug you found — which feature, what happened, and the steps...
report_bug.upload_text: Drag & drop an image here, or click to select
report_bug.err_connect: Failed to connect to server. Check your internet connection.
report_bug.tip_1: Describe the bug specifically — which feature, where, and when it occurred.
report_bug.tip_2: Include steps so we can understand the issue.
report_bug.tip_3: Attach a screenshot or error message if available.
report_bug.tip_4: Mention the expected behavior vs. what actually happened.

commands.page_desc: List of all available bot commands.
commands.header_desc: Complete list of available slash commands. All commands use the prefix
commands.cmd_welcome: Configure welcome notifications for new members joining the server.
commands.cmd_goodbye: Configure goodbye notifications when a member leaves the server.
commands.cmd_booster: Configure server boost and unboost notifications. Includes a booster welcome card.
commands.cmd_ticket: Manage the server ticket system — send panel, view active tickets, and configure staff role.
commands.cmd_autorole: Configure automatic role assignment when a member or bot joins the server.
commands.cmd_autorole_button: Create an interactive button panel so members can take or remove roles themselves.
commands.cmd_autorole_reaction: Create an emoji reaction panel so members can take or remove roles by clicking an emoji.
commands.cmd_warn: Member warning system — add, remove, reset, and view the warn list. Configurable with automatic actions.
commands.cmd_automod: Configure server automod — anti-link, anti-invite, spam detection, mass mention, and anti-raid.
commands.cmd_modlog: Configure the mod action log channel — ban, unban, kick, timeout, and warn are logged automatically.
commands.cmd_ban: Ban or unban a member from the server, with an optional reason and message history deletion.
commands.cmd_kick_mod: Kick a member from the server with an optional reason. Action is logged to mod log if configured.
commands.cmd_mute: Apply or remove a timeout on a member with a custom duration (e.g., 10m, 1h, 2d, max 28d).
commands.cmd_purge: Bulk delete messages in a channel — all messages, messages from a specific user, or bot messages only.
commands.cmd_lock: Lock or unlock a channel to prevent members from sending messages. Supports strict mode.
commands.cmd_slowmode: Set or remove slowmode in a channel to limit how often members can send messages.
commands.cmd_ping: Check bot latency and connection status to the Discord API.
commands.cmd_help: Show the list of available commands with a brief description.
commands.cmd_serverstats: Automatically set up server stats voice channels — total members, users, and bots.
commands.cmd_set_nickname: Change or reset the bot's nickname in this server.
commands.cmd_pesan: Create and manage custom embed message templates, send to any channel.
commands.cmd_invites: Display all server invite links sorted by most uses.
commands.cmd_giveaway: Create and manage server giveaways — start, end, reroll winners, and view the active giveaway list.
commands.cmd_userinfo: Display detailed information about a member — account, join date, roles, and timeout status.
commands.cmd_yt: Automatic notification when a YouTube channel uploads a new video. Configured via dashboard.
commands.cmd_tiktok: Automatic notification when a TikTok account uploads a new video. Configured via dashboard.
commands.cmd_twitch: Automatic notification when a Twitch streamer goes live. Configured via dashboard.
commands.cmd_kick_stream: Automatic notification when a Kick.com streamer goes live. Configured via dashboard.

privacy.notice: By using this bot or related services, you agree to this privacy policy. If you disagree, please stop using our services.
privacy.s1_p1: We collect minimal data required for bot operation. Here are the types of data collected:
privacy.s1_li1: Server ID (Guild ID) — to store per-server configuration
privacy.s1_li2: User ID — for invite tracking, giveaway, and log features
privacy.s1_li3: Channel ID — to determine the notification target channel
privacy.s1_li4: Role ID — for autorole configuration and giveaway requirements
privacy.s1_li5: Custom messages — notification text configured by server admins
privacy.s1_p2: We do not collect private message content, passwords, emails, or other sensitive information.
privacy.s2_p1: Collected data is used solely for:
privacy.s2_li1: Running bot features (welcome, goodbye, YouTube/TikTok/Twitch notifications, giveaway, etc.)
privacy.s2_li2: Storing server configuration set via the dashboard
privacy.s2_li3: Tracking invite link statistics within the server
privacy.s2_p2: Data is not used for advertising, commercial analytics, or purposes beyond bot operation.
privacy.s3_p1: All data is stored locally in a SQLite database on the server running the bot. Data is not uploaded to third-party cloud services.
privacy.s3_li1: Server configuration data is stored as long as the bot remains in that server
privacy.s3_li2: Data is automatically deleted when the bot is removed from the server
privacy.s3_li3: Admins can delete data at any time through the dashboard
privacy.s4_p1: We do not sell, rent, or share user data with third parties, except:
privacy.s4_li2: Third-party APIs used (YouTube API, Twitch API, TikTok/RSSHub) — only send public IDs to retrieve feed data
privacy.s5_p1: As a user, you have the right to:
privacy.s5_li1: Delete data — remove the bot from your server to delete all related server data
privacy.s5_li2: View data — all configuration is available on the dashboard
privacy.s5_li3: Request manual deletion — contact us through the support server
privacy.s6_p1: We implement standard security measures to protect data:
privacy.s6_li1: Discord OAuth2 authentication for dashboard access
privacy.s6_li2: Manage Guild permission verification before allowing configuration changes
privacy.s6_li4: Dashboard sessions are encrypted and have a limited expiry time
privacy.s7_p1: This privacy policy may be updated at any time. Significant changes will be announced via the Discord support server. The last update date is always shown at the top of this page.
privacy.s8_p1: Questions or requests regarding privacy can be submitted through:

tos.notice: ⚠️ Please read these terms carefully before using the bot. By adding the bot to your Discord server, you are deemed to have read and agreed to all of the following terms.
tos.s1_p1: By inviting, using, or accessing {{name}} ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use this Service.
tos.s1_p2: These terms apply to all users, including server administrators, moderators, and regular members who interact with the bot.
tos.s2_p1: {{name}} provides the following services for free:
tos.s2_li1: Automatic YouTube, TikTok, and Twitch notifications
tos.s2_li2: Welcome & goodbye system, autorole, boost notification
tos.s2_p2: We reserve the right to modify, restrict, or discontinue certain features at any time without prior notice.
tos.s3_p1: As a user of the Service, you are responsible for:
tos.s3_li1: Ensuring bot usage complies with Discord's Terms of Service
tos.s3_li2: Not using the bot for illegal or harmful activities
tos.s3_li3: Keeping your Discord account secure when accessing the dashboard
tos.s3_li4: Ensuring the bot permissions granted match your actual needs
tos.s4_p1: Users are prohibited from using the Service to:
tos.s4_li1: Send spam, flood, or content that violates the law

tos.s4_li3: Abuse giveaway features for unfair advantage
tos.s4_li4: Attempt to access data from other servers you do not own
tos.s4_li5: Use the bot for hate speech, harassment, or NSFW content
tos.s5_p1: We reserve the right to suspend or block Service access for servers or users that:
tos.s5_p2: Suspension may be carried out without prior notice in cases of serious violations.
tos.s6_p1: The Service is provided "as is" without any warranty. We are not responsible for:
tos.s6_li1: Data loss due to technical issues or bot updates
tos.s6_li2: Indirect damages from using or being unable to use the Service
tos.s6_li3: Content created or sent by users through bot features
tos.s6_li4: Downtime or disruptions from third-party services (Discord, YouTube, Twitch, etc.)
tos.s7_p1: All code, design, and content of {{name}} are owned by the developer. You are not allowed to:
tos.s7_li1: Redistribute or sell the bot's code without written permission
tos.s7_li2: Claim the bot or dashboard as your own work
tos.s7_p2: Personal and non-commercial use is permitted as long as these terms are followed.
tos.s8_p1: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. Significant changes will be announced through the support server. Continuing to use the Service after changes means you accept the new terms.
